station_address: 292, Kommrade Harbanslal Marg Koliwada, Marg, Sion East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text:
Don't use petrol from here. I use to fill my from here when i purchased my activa after  some time. My activa broke down due to water in my petrol.
I when take my activa to mechanic he said "some mixed thinner with petrol"
And same instance happen with my friend he has bullet, He filled full tank.
And also when you see petrol pump owner he tooooo arrogant because he has political touch.

station_address: 292, Kommrade Harbanslal Marg Koliwada, Marg, Sion East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text:
It looks like they have cheated me multiple times. Every time, they fill petrol for ₹300 even when we clearly ask for a full tank or a different amount. This has happened repeatedly, and I later noticed they seem to be doing this regularly with many customers.

It feels like they have preset the machine to stop at ₹300, and then they start again and fill the remaining amount requested — which is a common trick used for cheating.

If anyone else has had a similar experience, please share. There is definitely something suspicious going on at this pump. Please be careful.

station_address: 292, Kommrade Harbanslal Marg Koliwada, Marg, Sion East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text:
1 of my worst experiences at the petrol pump, I asked for Toilet direction at the pump and it was just behind washing bay at the toilet there was a huge LOCK,the door to access the toilet  not allowed by the petrol filling guy there was no water drinking pot and the staff was very rude
Very unhygienic manic chand was sit all over the petrol pump BAD experience
******Toilet is only for staff as per the employee ******
100 rs petrol and no basic facilities Bad Very Bad............

station_address: 292, Kommrade Harbanslal Marg Koliwada, Marg, Sion East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text:
This petrol pump has been doing scams with people for a very long time i have left filling petrol from this pump.

Please don't fill it here.

They will initially fill 100 ₹petrol even if you said any other amount and then again start from there.

I have noticed this many times so its recommendation not to fill here

Given one ⭐ but they're not worthy for that also.

station_address: 292, Kommrade Harbanslal Marg Koliwada, Marg, Sion East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400022
text: The behaviour of the worker at 06:00 am is very bad and there is no pressure in CNG. If you ask him to apply double pressure, he does not apply and if you ask him to return the money, he talks arrogantly. If this behaviour continues, we will be forced to leave this pump.
